title: dryopteris affinis subsp. stilluppensis
intro: Dryopteris affinis subsp. stilluppensis is a subspecies of the autumn fern, a type of evergreen fern native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopteris affinis subsp. stilluppensis include its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
